risk_if_not_implemented: Without Maintenance of Attribute Associations By System, AI and autonomous technology risks may go ungoverned, leading to unintended outcomes or exploitation.

compensating_control_1.name: Cybersecurity & Data Protection Attributes
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to bind cybersecurity and data protection attributes to information as it is stored, transmitted and processed.
compensating_control_1.justification: Cybersecurity & Data Protection Attributes (DCH-05) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Maintenance of Attribute Associations By System (DCH-05.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Media Marking
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to mark media in accordance with data protection requirements so that personnel are alerted to distribution limitations, handling caveats and applicable security requirements.
compensating_control_2.justification: Media Marking (DCH-04) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Maintenance of Attribute Associations By System (DCH-05.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
